text: I packed a bag and hopped on a plane
[music] Friday afternoon. I slept in on
Saturday. I ate so much mokar. This week
I'm [music] back to the grind. Vanuna.
I just got back from a solo trip to
Jedju. I went to visit a family that
I've gotten to know over the years and
am very close with. I hadn't seen them
for a really long time, so I wanted to
spend some good quality time together. I
packed a bag and hopped on a plane
Friday afternoon. When I arrived, the
mom picked me up at the airport and gave
me a little tour around the island. When
school got out, we picked up their two
daughters and went to one of their
favorite restaurants. It was an Italian
restaurant and oh my gosh, the food was
so good. We caught up over a bottle of
wine and lots of delicious food like
pasta, steak, and salad. I can't even
pick a favorite dish because everything
was incredible. It's in Hapj. So, we
also got a beautiful view of the beach,
which was a nice treat. Afterwards, we
headed home and the girls and I made a
Halloween themed gingerbread house.
Making gingerbread houses together
during the holidays is kind of our
tradition now. We each made our own and
had family and friends vote for the
winner. The oldest daughter won, but
they both did such a great job. Me, on
the other hand, not so much. But we
laughed a lot and had an amazing time,
and that's what matters most. After all
of the excitement, I slept like a baby.
So, I slept in on Saturday and had kind
of a slow morning, which was really
nice. They made a reservation for us to
go on a yacht tour. So, that was our
first outing of the day. I love being on
the water, so I was super excited for
this part of the trip. The boat was huge
and they had all you can drink wine and
beer plus some snacks. We did have two
small cups of beer, but we didn't go too
crazy. The weather was sunny and nice,
but it was extremely windy, so there
were huge waves and you had to be very
careful walking on the boat. Also, my
hair was blowing all over the place, so
I looked a little bit crazy. We all
cracked up at our photos because it
looked like I had a mop on my head. My
pants were blowing up like a parachute,
too. I was just a hot mess. We rode past
a bunch of cliffs and caves and I really
felt the island vibe of Jedju there. We
even got to go fishing at one point.
Unfortunately, we didn't catch any fish,
but some other people on the boat did.
Honestly, this was probably my highlight
of the whole trip because we took so
many photos together and shared a lot of
laughs. The younger sister is super into
horses these days, so I promised her I'd
go horseback riding with her. I am
extremely inexperienced and I was a bit
nervous, but it ended up being a really
cool experience. The staff took great
care of me and explained everything
really well. It also helped that I rode
a very old, slow, and calm horse. They
even called him Grandpa Horse. I think
he was the perfect fit for me. We spent
most of the time doing laps inside, but
at the very end, we got to go outside
for a little trail walk together. It was
really nice getting some fresh air and
enjoying the scenery. They also had a
really cute golden retriever there, so
we played with him and fed him lots of
treats. I really want a dog these days.
So, take notes. Cameramen. You can't
leave Jedju without having some black
pork barbecue. So, that's what we had
for our last dinner together. Fun fact,
the first barbecue I ever had in Korea
was black pork in je. So, it was really
nice getting to enjoy that taste again.
The restaurant was really fancy and
looked like an art gallery. They did all
of the grilling for us. And I ate so
much mokar. It's my absolute favorite.
It was the perfect way to end my trip in
Ju. And early Saturday morning, I took a
flight back to Busousan. Time really
flew by. But this weekend was full of so
many precious moments that I'll never
forget. This week, I'm back to the grind
with work and school, but I'm feeling
refreshed and energized after a healing
weekend in Jedju. So, bring it on. I
hope you have a great week ahead and I
will see you next time. Good night.
